description: Detects Angular bypassSecurityTrustResourceUrl usage, which can disable resource URL sanitization.
remediation: Review resource URLs against a strict allowlist before calling bypassSecurityTrustResourceUrl.
confidence_rationale: The API intentionally opts out of Angular resource URL protection and is highly specific.

description: Detects Angular DomSanitizer bypassSecurityTrustHtml usage, which can bypass built-in sanitization when fed untrusted HTML.
remediation: Prefer Angular's default sanitization flow and reserve bypassSecurityTrustHtml for reviewed, trusted content only.
confidence_rationale: The rule targets Angular's explicit sanitizer bypass API, which is a precise framework-specific signal.
